title: Forms and guides
content:
Individual tax return This is the income tax return for individuals.
Tax code declaration Use this form if you’re receiving salary or wages as an employee.
Subject International
KiwiSaver deduction form Use this form to tell your employer your KiwiSaver contribution rate - KS2.
Donation tax credit claim form Use this form to claim your donation tax credits.
Individual tax return guide Use this guide to help you complete your IR3 income tax return.
Rental income schedule Fill in one of these forms for each property you rent out, and send it to us with your income tax return.
Subject Income tax Subject Property
Financial statements summary A summary for businesses to include a financial statement to assist with processing their income tax return.
Subject Income tax Subject Managing my tax
KiwiSaver opt-out request Use this form to opt out of KiwiSaver.
IRD number application individual currently in New Zealand Use this form to apply for an IRD number.
Subject Managing my tax
Overseas income summary This form can be used to declare overseas income.
Weekly and fortnightly PAYE deduction tables Tax tables for weekly and fortnightly pay periods.
Your introduction to KiwiSaver – employee information Introduction to KiwiSaver for employees.
Income tax return estate or trust This is the income tax return for estates or trusts.
Income tax return: companies Companies use this return each year to tell us about their income and expenses.
Rental income This guide is for people who rent out residential property and holiday homes.
KiwiSaver for new employees KiwiSaver guide for new employees.
Schedule of business income If you're in business, you can use this schedule instead of completing a set of financial accounts. Attach it to your IR3 tax return.
Tax rate notification for contractors If you’re a contractor getting schedular payments, use this form to tell your payer how much tax to deduct.
Subject International
Employer's guide Information to help you with your responsibilities as an employer.
Subject Employing staff
GST guide This guide helps you to understand GST, including when it's charged, how to file returns, how adjustments work, and different types of supplies.
Subject GST (goods and services tax)
Estate or trust return guide Read this guide to help you fill in your IR6 return. If you need more help, read our guide Trusts' and estates' income tax rules - IR288.
IRD number application - resident non-individual Use this form to apply for an IRD number for your organisation.
Subject Managing my tax Subject International
What is FamilyBoost? This fact sheet gives an overview of FamilyBoost, including who can claim and the amount you may be able to claim.
Goods and services tax return The return you use to calculate and file your goods and services tax (GST)
Subject GST (goods and services tax)
Disclosure of financial position Use this form to tell us about what you owe, what you own and your income and expenses.
Subject Managing my tax
